Property details

Listing # HAM42269 | Listed on 6 March

Presenting a fantastic opportunity to secure a charming, low-maintenance home tacked away in a highly convenient location. This is a sanctuary, perfect for first-home buyers, downsizers, or savvy investors, this single-level property offers peace and privacy.

Here is why you will love this one:
Classic Wood Feel: Step inside and be greeted by the warmth and distinctive character of the beautiful wood interior, providing a timeless, cosy and romantic atmosphere.
Ideal Size: Featuring 3 generous bedrooms and 1 family bathroom, the home offers ample living space for a family, retirees or tenants searching for that Lifestyle living, but want to stay in town.
Income stream available: Wonderful tenants in place generating $565 per week making this the ideal investment for someone looking to start a portfolio. Tenants would love to stay after their fix term ends.
Space & Storage: Enjoy the convenience of a single-level layout, plenty of storage, and usable outdoor space on a 1/2 share of 1305 square metres (more or less).
Low Maintenance: The design and construction mean less time on upkeep and more time enjoying your new home.

Location, Location, Location:
Excellent Connectivity: Located close to the new Peacocke Bridge, providing quick and easy access to both sides of the river.
City Amenities: You are just a short distance from the hospital, local takeaways, town and parks, adding to the convenience and lifestyle appeal.
Don't miss the chance to own this versatile and appealing property!

Don't miss the opportunity to view it before it's gone, contact Karina on 0220434770

Land Area Disclaimer
PLEASE NOTE: Specified floor and land area sizes have been obtained from sources such as Property Guru, Hamilton City Council (LIM) or Title documents. They have not been measured by the Salesperson or Online Realty Ltd. We recommend you seek your own independent legal advice if these sizes are material to your purchasing decision.
